methods.name: optIn

args.name: asset
args.desc: The asset to be opted into

methods.desc: optin tells the contract to opt into an asa

version.desc: the current version of the contract

akitaDAO.desc: the app ID of the Akita DAO

disbursements.desc:
the disbursement map of tokens

the key is the uint64 id of the disbursement
the value is the details of the disbursement

userAllocations.desc:
the user allocations of disbursements

the key is the address of the qualified account with the uint64 id of the disbursement
the value is the amount they are owed

invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
